source: in-session Claude Code agent (pred-scout-coach) over the committed artifacts + omeda item/ability data only; every number ground-checked, failing lines dropped

metaBuilds.synergy: Dawnstar then Xenia then Raiment front-loads tankiness so Adele can sit in her Iron Rose shield and Queen's Garden root while shrugging off magic, then keep allies shielded.
metaBuilds.holes: Adds almost no power, so her thorns and vine ticks stay weak and she becomes a body that roots but never threatens a kill.

metaBuilds.synergy: Dynamo then Gaia Greaves then Vanguardian stacks physical armor so Adele dives in with Imperial Lash and Queen's Garden, with Dynamo amplifying ally damage on the rooted target.
metaBuilds.holes: It is pure physical armor; a magic-heavy enemy team melts through this and her own damage output stays minimal.

metaBuilds.synergy: Fire Blossom then Tainted Guard then Inquisition stacks physical armor and anti-heal so Adele bodyblocks, and Tainted Guard's healing cut bites enemies caught in her Queen's Garden.
metaBuilds.holes: Slow online (around minute 27) and weak versus magic damage, so Adele is fragile and passive in early skirmishes.

optimizer.synergy: Stonewall then Warden's Faith then Vainglory stacks heavy physical armor so Adele anchors the front, holds enemies in Queen's Garden, and survives focus while allies cash in her Thorns passive.

swaps.gain: Far more physical survivability so Adele lives through dives while channeling Queen's Garden's root.
swaps.lose: Dynamo's damage-amp on the rooted target that helped allies burst it.

swaps.gain: More physical armor and the 5% physical mitigation, letting Adele eat front-line focus.
swaps.lose: Fire Blossom's ramping burn that chipped enemies stuck in her Thornbush.

optimizer.holes: It is almost entirely physical armor and health, so Adele offers nothing to a fight beyond a body that roots and never punishes.

metaBuilds.synergy: Dawnstar then Xenia then Raiment makes Adele a magic-tanky bruiser who dives with Imperial Lash and locks targets in Queen's Garden, refreshing Thorns while staying alive.
metaBuilds.holes: In a solo lane this gives no kill pressure, so Adele can win trades but struggles to actually finish a kill or push.

metaBuilds.synergy: Dynamo then Gaia Greaves then Vanguardian armors Adele to dive, with Dynamo's mark amplifying the burst on whatever she roots with Queen's Garden.
metaBuilds.holes: All physical armor means a magic-damage laner punishes her, and her own damage stays low for an offlaner.

metaBuilds.synergy: Fire Blossom then Tainted Guard then Inquisition gives armor plus anti-heal, so Adele bullies sustain bruisers stuck in her Thornbush slow.
metaBuilds.holes: Comes online slowly and is one-sided physical armor, so Adele is passive and easily kited early.

optimizer.synergy: Viper then Solaris then Augmentation builds attack speed and penetration so Adele's true-damage basics and Iron Rose vine shred armored targets while Solaris heals her through trades.
optimizer.holes: This squishy damage build throws away Adele's natural tankiness and shield, so she gets blown up if a dive goes wrong.

metaBuilds.synergy: Megacosm then Gaussian Greaves then Void Helm pairs max-health burn with Akeron's sustain, and Void Helm's +20% healing supercharges Crushing Maw lifesteal and Consume's bite heal.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 420 damage over a 10-second rotation in the sim, so Akeron tanks well but barely threatens a kill.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Crescelia then Oathkeeper loads magic power and spellblade procs so Hellfire, Web Lash, and Consume hit far harder while staying healthy enough to brawl.

swaps.gain: About 3.4 times the 10-second rotation damage, turning Hellfire and Consume into real threats.
swaps.lose: Megacosm's max-health burn and bonus tankiness that let Akeron sit in extended fights.

optimizer.holes: Trading the meta's health for power makes Akeron squishier, so a hard dive can kill him before his sustain spins up.

metaBuilds.synergy: Megacosm then Gaussian Greaves then Void Helm gives clear speed and survivability, with Void Helm's +20% healing boosting Crushing Maw and Consume sustain through ganks.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 420 damage over a 10-second rotation, so Akeron's ganks lack the burst to secure kills against squishies.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Crescelia then Oathkeeper stacks magic power and spellblade hits so Hellfire and Web Lash burst harder, making Akeron's gank true kill pressure.

swaps.gain: About 3.4 times the 10-second rotation damage so ganks actually convert to kills.
swaps.lose: Megacosm's max-health burn and tankiness for surviving counter-ganks.

optimizer.holes: Less health means a contested objective or counter-jungle fight can drop Akeron before his Consume execute lands.

metaBuilds.synergy: Azure Core then Entropy then Wraith Leggings stacks mana and magic power so Argus can spam Particle Shredder while Entropy and Wraith amplify every Disintegrate-stacked ability tick.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 64 auto-attack DPS in the sim, so if his abilities are dodged Argus has almost no fallback damage.

metaBuilds.synergy: Azure Core then Combustion then Wraith Leggings front-loads burst so Argus opens Dread Nova stun, then Combustion and Disintegrate stacks detonate the locked target.
metaBuilds.holes: Around 686 burst in one combo leans on landing the Dread Nova stun first; whiff it and the combo fizzles.

metaBuilds.synergy: Timewarp then Tainted Scepter then Dynamo lowers cooldowns so Argus cycles Ether Crystal and Particle Shredder constantly, with Tainted Scepter cutting enemy healing in long fights.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Timewarp then Oathkeeper builds power and cooldowns so Argus channels Synaptic Obliterator more often while Disintegrate stacks make each beam land harder.

swaps.gain: About 33% more one-combo burst plus the current-health bonus damage for melting tanks.
swaps.lose: Azure Core's big mana pool and shield that kept Particle Shredder firing safely.

swaps.gain: About 2.1 times the 10-second rotation damage thanks to flat power and on-hit burst.
swaps.lose: Timewarp's heavy cooldown reduction that let Argus recast Ether Crystal far faster.

optimizer.holes: It is glass-cannon magic power, so any flanker who reaches Argus during his long ultimate channel kills him instantly.

metaBuilds.synergy: Azure Core then Entropy then Wraith Leggings gives mana to spam Particle Shredder and power to make Disintegrate-stacked ticks hurt, useful for a poke support.
metaBuilds.holes: Squishy with about 64 auto DPS, so a support Argus dies to any dive and adds no protection for his carry.

metaBuilds.synergy: Azure Core then Combustion then Wraith Leggings front-loads burst so Argus lands Dread Nova stun then deletes the target, peeling by deleting threats.
metaBuilds.holes: It is full damage with no defense, so as a support he cannot body-block or save his carry, only kill from range.

metaBuilds.synergy: Timewarp then Tainted Scepter then Dynamo lets Argus cycle Ether Crystal's push/pull crowd control often while Tainted Scepter shuts down enemy healing in fights.
metaBuilds.holes: Still has no real tankiness, so Argus gets blown up before his cooldowns matter in a chaotic teamfight.

optimizer.synergy: Stonewall then Warden's Faith then Vainglory makes Argus a true tank support who walks up, lands Dread Nova stun and Ether Crystal, and survives to keep the crowd control flowing.
optimizer.holes: Going full tank guts Argus's damage, so his abilities barely tickle and he relies entirely on crowd control to matter.

metaBuilds.synergy: Prophecy then Orion then Magnify stacks magic power and attack speed so Aurora's Shatter on-hit magic and Frost Storm passive shred, with Magnify cutting enemy magic armor.
Magnify then Elafrost then Flux Matrix mixes power, health and armor so Aurora dives with Boreal Sweep, and Flux Matrix makes locked targets take more magic damage.
metaBuilds.holes: Bruiser stats dilute her burst, so Aurora can survive a dive but often cannot finish the kill.

metaBuilds.synergy: Magnify then Elafrost then Tainted Scepter blends survivability with anti-heal, letting Aurora out-grind sustain bruisers caught in her slows and Frost Storm.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Wraith Leggings then Oathkeeper front-loads power and penetration so Cryoseism and Boreal Sweep burst, while Magnify's shred multiplies it on a single locked target.

swaps.gain: About 49% more 10-second rotation damage plus current-health bonus to punish tanks.
swaps.lose: Prophecy's attack speed that powered Aurora's on-hit Shatter and Frost Storm uptime.

swaps.gain: About 48% more damage in extended fights from flat power and the health-based bonus.
swaps.lose: Magnify's magic-armor shred, omnivamp sustain, and health that made Aurora a sturdier brawler.

optimizer.holes: This drops Aurora's bruiser tankiness, so without landing Hoarfrost or Cryoseism first she gets caught and killed.

metaBuilds.synergy: Prophecy then Orion then Magnify gives clear-friendly attack speed and power so Aurora ganks with Hoarfrost root then Cryoseism, Magnify shredding the target's magic armor.
metaBuilds.holes: Squishy core, so a failed gank or invade leaves Aurora with no defenses to escape.

metaBuilds.synergy: Magnify then Elafrost then Flux Matrix makes Aurora a durable ganker; Elafrost slows on-hit to extend Hoarfrost setups and Flux Matrix amplifies her magic burst.
metaBuilds.holes: The bruiser stats lower her combo damage, so ganks may not kill outright against a healthy carry.

metaBuilds.synergy: Magnify then Elafrost then Tainted Scepter adds anti-heal so Aurora wins drawn-out skirmishes around objectives where her slows keep enemies in the Frost Storm.
metaBuilds.holes: Built for long fights, so Aurora struggles to secure quick objective bursts against a fed enemy.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Orion then Oathkeeper builds power, cooldowns and on-hit so Aurora ganks with full Cryoseism burst, with Caustica's penetration carving through magic armor.

swaps.gain: About 52% more 10-second rotation damage and bonus damage scaling with the target's health.
swaps.lose: Prophecy's attack speed that fueled Aurora's on-hit Shatter and faster Frost Storm triggers.

swaps.gain: About 49% more extended-fight damage from raw power and the current-health bonus.
swaps.lose: Magnify's armor shred, sustain and health that let Aurora brawl at objectives.

optimizer.holes: Full damage means Aurora has no tankiness, so any counter-jungle ambush kills her before Cryoseism resolves.

metaBuilds.synergy: Prophecy then Orion then Magnify gives Aurora poke power to threaten with Boreal Sweep and Hoarfrost from range while Magnify softens magic armor for her allies.
metaBuilds.holes: Zero defense on a support, so Aurora dies to any engage and cannot peel for her carry.

metaBuilds.synergy: Magnify then Elafrost then Flux Matrix lets a roaming Aurora dive with Cryoseism lockdown and survive, Flux Matrix boosting team magic damage on the held target.
metaBuilds.holes: Still mostly damage stats, so against heavy engage Aurora gets blown up before landing her crowd control.

metaBuilds.synergy: Magnify then Elafrost then Tainted Scepter pairs durability with anti-heal so Aurora locks down and grinds sustain targets with her slows and Frost Storm.
metaBuilds.holes: Built for long fights, so a burst engage onto Aurora ends her before her value shows.

optimizer.synergy: Stonewall then Inquisition then Raiment makes Aurora a tank support who walks up, lands Hoarfrost root and Cryoseism stun, and survives long enough to keep crowd control flowing.

swaps.gain: About 11% more magical survivability so Aurora anchors the front line through focus.
swaps.lose: Magnify's magic power, armor shred and omnivamp that gave her real damage and sustain.

optimizer.holes: Full tank guts Aurora's burst, so Cryoseism and Boreal Sweep barely chip; she becomes pure crowd control with no kill threat.

metaBuilds.synergy: Overlord then Rapture then Cursed Scroll stacks health and on-hit so Bayle dives with Skull Crusher, sustains via Dire Howl omnivamp, and Berserk attack speed cashes in Rapture's on-hit.
metaBuilds.holes: Low raw power means Bayle is very tanky but his Kingslayer and Cursed Edge struggle to actually finish squishies.

metaBuilds.synergy: Earthshaker then Basilisk then Salvation builds power and armor shred so Bayle's Cursed Edge and Skull Crusher hit harder, with Salvation's shield covering his dive.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 749 over a 10-second rotation; against burst it falls short and Bayle relies on Salvation to not get deleted.

metaBuilds.synergy: Overlord then Cursed Scroll then Sky Splitter pairs health with current-health on-hit so Bayle's fast Berserk basics melt tanks while staying durable.
metaBuilds.holes: About 646 one-combo burst leans on Berserk being active; if Bayle is healthy he hits far softer.

optimizer.synergy: Solaris then Viper then Spear of Desolation front-loads power and armor pen so Bayle's Kingslayer and Skull Crusher slam through armor, Solaris healing him mid-dive.

swaps.gain: About 52% more 10-second rotation damage plus a healing crit-capable on-hit to sustain dives.
swaps.lose: Earthshaker's health and stacking ability-damage ramp that suited a longer brawl.

swaps.gain: About 32% more one-combo burst and lifesteal on a powered basic to finish kills.
swaps.lose: Overlord's big health pool and cleave that made Bayle a sturdy frontliner.

optimizer.holes: This lethality build is far squishier, so if Bayle dives in with Kingslayer and the kill fails he gets focused down.

metaBuilds.synergy: Overlord then Rapture then Cursed Scroll gives Bayle health and on-hit for ganks; Skull Crusher's armor shred plus Berserk attack speed feeds Rapture's bonus on-hit damage.
metaBuilds.holes: Low power means Bayle survives ganks but often can't burst a target down before they escape.

metaBuilds.synergy: Earthshaker then Basilisk then Salvation stacks power, armor shred and a shield so Bayle ganks with Cursed Edge and Skull Crusher then survives the counter.
metaBuilds.holes: About 749 over a 10-second rotation isn't enough quick burst, so squishies can flash away from his gank.

metaBuilds.synergy: Overlord then Cursed Scroll then Sky Splitter blends health with current-health on-hit so Bayle's Berserk basics shred objectives and tanks while staying alive.
metaBuilds.holes: About 646 one-combo burst depends on Berserk being live; at full health his gank damage is weak.

optimizer.synergy: Solaris then Viper then Spear of Desolation builds power and armor pen so Bayle's Kingslayer lockdown and Skull Crusher carve through armor, Solaris sustaining him in the jungle.

swaps.gain: About 52% more 10-second rotation damage and a healing crit-capable on-hit for skirmishes.
swaps.lose: Earthshaker's health and ability-damage ramp built for longer fights.

swaps.gain: About 32% more one-combo burst plus lifesteal to secure gank kills.
swaps.lose: Overlord's health stacking and cleave that made Bayle tanky around objectives.

optimizer.holes: Lethality makes Bayle squishy, so a contested objective or counter-jungle ambush can kill him before Kingslayer resolves.

metaBuilds.synergy: Sky Splitter then Tainted Blade then Rapture stacks on-hit so Boris's Tesseract Core and Chrono Swipe shred, with Tainted Blade's anti-heal and Hex amplifying his sustained damage.
metaBuilds.holes: Low burst, so Boris peels and bullies but his Ursine Burst grab rarely outright kills a target.

metaBuilds.synergy: Sky Splitter then Basilisk then Rapture pairs current-health on-hit with armor shred so Boris's frequent basics, fed by Canister attack speed, melt tanks.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 350 over a 10-second rotation; his actual ability damage is weak so kills come slowly.

metaBuilds.synergy: Sky Splitter then Rapture then Draconum stacks health and healing so Boris frontlines, with Draconum's heal scaling and his passive on-hit sustain keeping him alive.
metaBuilds.holes: Built to survive, not kill, so Boris is hard to remove but offers little burst on his Ursine Burst pick.

optimizer.synergy: Viper then Basilisk then Solaris stacks armor shred and power so Boris's Chrono Swipe and Tesseract Core on-hits cut through tanks, Solaris healing him through the dive.

swaps.gain: About 2.1 times the 10-second rotation damage via armor shred and increased on-hit damage.
swaps.lose: Sky Splitter's current-health on-hit that chunked high-health tanks and its lifesteal sustain.

optimizer.holes: Dropping Sky Splitter's percent-health damage means Boris struggles against very tanky targets, and the build is less durable for frontlining.

metaBuilds.synergy: Combustion then Noxia then Wraith stacks magic power and penetration so Countess's Eventide and Feast combo bursts, with Noxia's marked-target detonation amplifying her Feast leap on a single hero.
metaBuilds.holes: Squishy core, so if Countess's Feast leap drops her into the enemy team and the kill fails she gets collapsed on.

metaBuilds.synergy: Spirit of Amir then Wraith then Noxia adds some health and lifesteal so Countess's Blade Siphon self-heal sustains her in fights while she still hits hard with abilities.
Combustion then Wraith then Overseer front-loads power and magic lifesteal so Countess's Feast all-in heals her back, Overseer's amp boosting the combo to delete a target.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Orion then Oathkeeper builds power, attack speed and on-hit so Countess's Feast and Eventide burst harder while the current-health bonus helps her finish chunky targets.

swaps.gain: About 30% more 10-second rotation damage plus bonus damage scaling with the target's health.
swaps.lose: Combustion's repeating area Pyro burst and big mana pool for sustained casting.

swaps.gain: About 12% more physical survivability and current-health bonus damage on Feast.
swaps.lose: Spirit of Amir's magic lifesteal that helped Countess drain back health from Blade Siphon.

optimizer.holes: It is still glass-cannon, so Countess's Feast dive is a gamble: whiff the kill and she has no escape or defenses.

metaBuilds.synergy: Combustion then Noxia then Wraith stacks power and penetration so Countess's Eventide poke and Feast all-in burst down a laner, Noxia adding max-health damage on the marked target.
metaBuilds.holes: No defenses, so a beefy offlaner can survive Countess's combo and punish her once Feast is on cooldown.

metaBuilds.synergy: Spirit of Amir then Wraith then Noxia adds health and lifesteal so Countess's Blade Siphon heal lets her trade and brawl in lane while keeping ability damage.
Combustion then Wraith then Overseer pairs power with magic lifesteal so Countess's Feast dive heals her up and Overseer's amp secures the kill.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Orion then Oathkeeper builds power and on-hit so Countess's Feast and Eventide hit harder, with the current-health bonus letting her chunk tankier laners.

swaps.gain: About 30% more 10-second rotation damage and health-based bonus damage to punish bulky laners.
swaps.lose: Combustion's repeating Pyro area burst and large mana pool for extended trades.

swaps.gain: About 12% more physical survivability plus current-health bonus on her Feast.
swaps.lose: Spirit of Amir's magic lifesteal that sustained Countess through lane via Blade Siphon.

optimizer.holes: Still squishy, so a failed Feast dive in the solo lane leaves Countess with no way out.

metaBuilds.synergy: Combustion then Noxia then Wraith stacks power and penetration so Countess ganks with Shadow Slip into Feast burst, Noxia's detonation adding max-health damage on the suppressed target.
metaBuilds.holes: Squishy, so a counter-gank catches Countess out once she commits Feast and has no escape.

metaBuilds.synergy: Spirit of Amir then Wraith then Noxia gives jungle lifesteal and a little health so Countess clears safely and Blade Siphon sustains her through ganks.
Combustion then Wraith then Overseer pairs power with magic lifesteal so Countess's Feast all-in heals her back and Overseer's amp deletes a squishy.

optimizer.synergy: Spectral Schematics then Orion then Oathkeeper builds power and on-hit so Countess's Feast and Eventide gank burst is higher, with current-health bonus to punish chunkier targets.

swaps.gain: About 30% more 10-second rotation damage and health-based bonus damage for ganks.
swaps.lose: Combustion's repeating Pyro area burst and mana pool for long clears.

swaps.gain: About 12% more physical survivability and current-health bonus on Feast.
swaps.lose: Spirit of Amir's magic lifesteal that boosted Countess's jungle clear sustain.

optimizer.holes: Pure burst means Countess has no defenses, so a contested objective fight can kill her right after Feast lands.

metaBuilds.synergy: Berserker's Axe then Augmentation then Salvation gives health and empowered basics so Crunch's Cross Crunch amplified attack and True Strike land hard between his Left/Right Crunch combos.
Augmentation then Mutilator then Salvation pairs empowered basics with percent-health damage so Crunch's combo plus Cross Crunch-boosted hit chunks tanks while Salvation shields his all-in.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 729 one-combo burst; against a healthy bruiser Crunch can't kill and gets outlasted.

metaBuilds.synergy: Syonic Echo then Ashbringer then Draconum builds attack speed and cooldown-on-hit so Crunch's Re-Crunch heal and Cross Crunch cycle faster for sustained brawling.
metaBuilds.holes: Worst-performing core at 41.3% with only about 224 auto DPS, so Crunch's damage falls far short of bruiser builds.

optimizer.synergy: Viper then Basilisk then Spear of Desolation stacks penetration and power so Crunch's Forward/Left/Right Crunch combo carves through armor, with Cross Crunch's amplified basic finishing the burst.

swaps.gain: About 48% more sustained auto DPS via armor shred and increased on-hit damage.
swaps.lose: Syonic Echo's attack-speed burst window and reset that powered Crunch's basic-attack flurry.

optimizer.holes: This lethality build drops most of Crunch's health, so a dive in with his short-range combo gets him focused down fast.

metaBuilds.synergy: Berserker's Axe then Augmentation then Salvation gives health and empowered basics so Crunch ganks with Forward Crunch then chains Cross Crunch-boosted hits, Salvation shielding the dive.
Augmentation then Mutilator then Salvation adds percent-health damage so Crunch's combo plus empowered basics chunk tanky targets while Salvation covers his all-in.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 729 one-combo burst, so a healthy target survives Crunch's gank and he's left exposed.

metaBuilds.synergy: Syonic Echo then Ashbringer then Draconum stacks attack speed and cooldown-on-hit so Crunch's Re-Crunch heal and abilities cycle nonstop in extended skirmishes.
metaBuilds.holes: Worst core at 41.3% and only about 224 auto DPS, so Crunch clears and skirmishes far weaker than the bruiser options.

optimizer.synergy: Viper then Basilisk then Spear of Desolation stacks penetration and power so Crunch's gank combo cuts through armor and Cross Crunch's amplified basic seals the kill.

swaps.gain: About 48% more sustained auto DPS through armor shred and increased on-hit damage.
swaps.lose: Syonic Echo's attack-speed burst and reset that drove Crunch's basic-attack flurry and clear speed.

optimizer.holes: Lethality leaves Crunch squishy, so committing his short-range Forward Crunch gank into a group can get him killed.

metaBuilds.synergy: Crescelia then Timewarp then Dynamo slashes cooldowns so Dekker recasts Stasis Bomb, Photon Disruptor and Containment Fence faster, Dynamo amplifying damage on her stunned targets.
metaBuilds.holes: Only about 89 auto DPS and no defenses, so Dekker dies instantly if anyone reaches her after she throws crowd control.

metaBuilds.synergy: Crescelia then Tainted Scepter then Timewarp adds power and anti-heal so Dekker's Photon Disruptor and Ion Strike poke harder and cut enemy healing while cooldowns stay low.
metaBuilds.holes: Still very squishy; a single gap-closer onto Dekker ends her before her cooldowns matter.

metaBuilds.synergy: Crescelia then Dynamo then Tainted Scepter blends cooldowns, a damage-amp on stunned targets, and anti-heal so Dekker's Ion Strike stun setups hurt more.
metaBuilds.holes: About 89 auto DPS and thin defenses, so Dekker is a free kill once her crowd control is on cooldown.

metaBuilds.synergy: Lightning Hawk then Vanquisher then Imperator stacks crit and power so Drongo's Rad Rounds basics and crits trigger Wastelander bleeds, Imperator amplifying the crit burst into a delete.
metaBuilds.holes: Crit relies on landing autos; if Drongo gets kited off his Rad Rounds window his burst evaporates.

metaBuilds.synergy: Lightning Hawk then Vanquisher then Tainted Rounds builds crit and attack speed so Drongo's sustained Rad Rounds DPS climbs, Tainted Rounds cutting healing and ramping as targets drop.

metaBuilds.synergy: Lightning Hawk then Vanquisher then Sky Splitter adds current-health on-hit so Drongo's fast Rad Rounds autos shred tanks while Vanquisher executes low targets.
metaBuilds.holes: Sky Splitter is reduced for ranged heroes, so Drongo squeezes less out of its percent-health hit than a melee would.

optimizer.synergy: Viper then Deathstalker then Vanquisher stacks attack speed and armor shred so Drongo's Rad Rounds basics melt through armor, building toward Imperator and Demolisher for crit burst.

swaps.gain: Up to about 28% more sustained auto DPS via stacking armor shred and increased on-hit damage.

swaps.lose: Vanquisher's execute for instantly finishing low-health laners.
